name: Barbecue Soy Burgers
recipeInstructions: These nutty burgers are a barbecue favorite, great on whole-wheat onion bun with the traditional toppings of tomato, cheese, lettuce and so on. Freshly ground black pepper to taste. In a small pan, sauté onion and garlic in butter or margarine until translucent. Set aside. In a food processor, blend soybeans, bread crumbs, egg, soy sauce, and sesame seeds into a coarse mixture. Transfer to a medium bowl, add the garlic-onion mixture and black pepper, and mix well. Shape into 4 patties. Heat on grill for about 5 minutes each side until browned.
